title: Fix section title and badge count — 'Active Positions' confusion
acceptance:
- Section header reads 'Positions' not 'Active Positions'
- When there are 0 open trades and 0 shadow positions but 2 resolved trades showing, badge reads '0' not '2'
- Badge increments correctly when a live open position exists
- cmd-open and pos-count badge now agree when there are no shadow-only positions
- Resolved position cards still render — they are not hidden, just not counted in the badge
